channel.title: Two Dad Jokes Daily
channel.description: Two fresh dad jokes every day, delivered by an animated dad. For TikTok and Instagram Reels.

item.title: Throwback Thursday #106: Golfing Advice!
item.description:
Did you know you should always take an extra pair of pants golfing?
Just in case you get a hole in one.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260528-2341.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
item.dadjokefix:setup: Did you know you should always take an extra pair of pants golfing?
item.dadjokefix:punchline: Just in case you get a hole in one.
item.dadjokefix:tiktok_caption:
Did you know you should always take an extra pair of pants golfing? Just in case you get a hole in one. 👇 rate it 1-10 in comments
🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily
#dadjokefix #dadjoke #dadjokes #aiavatar #aigenerated #wordplay #cornyjokes #funnyvideos #shorts #golf #pants #holeinone
item.dadjokefix:instagram_caption:
Did you know you should always take an extra pair of pants golfing?
Just in case you get a hole in one. 🫥
Drop a number 1-10 in comments — how bad was it?
Follow @dadjokefix for two dad jokes a day.
🤖 Hank is an AI character. Voice, face and animation are all generated. . . . #dadjokefix #dadjoke #dadjokes #aiavatar #aigenerated #wordplay #cornyjokes #funnyvideos #shorts #golf #pants #holeinone
item.dadjokefix:youtube_caption:
Did you know you should always take an extra pair of pants golfing?
Just in case you get a hole in one.
---

item.title: Throwback Thursday #105: Booked For Assault!
item.description:
A book just fell on my head.
I only have my shelf to blame.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260528-2034.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.dadjokefix:punchline: I only have my shelf to blame.

🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily

item.title: Throwback Thursday #104: Grandfather Clock's Got Jokes!
item.description:
What did the digital clock say to the grandfather clock?
Look, no hands!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260528-1737.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.dadjokefix:punchline: Look, no hands!

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #103: Roosters Can...?
item.description:
What's the difference between a rooster and a crow?
A rooster can crow but a crow cannot rooster.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260527-2337.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
item.dadjokefix:setup: What's the difference between a rooster and a crow?
item.dadjokefix:punchline: A rooster can crow but a crow cannot rooster.
item.dadjokefix:tiktok_caption:
What's the difference between a rooster and a crow? A rooster can crow but a crow cannot rooster. 👇 rate it 1-10 in comments
🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily
#dadjokes #dadjoke #dadjokefix #aicontent #aicomedy #punny #lameanddumbjokes #comedyshort #fyp #rooster #crow #bird
item.dadjokefix:instagram_caption:
What's the difference between a rooster and a crow?
A rooster can crow but a crow cannot rooster. 🫥
Drop a number 1-10 in comments — how bad was it?
Follow @dadjokefix for two dad jokes a day.

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #102: Orange You Glad He Got Fired?
item.description:
Why did the worker get fired from the orange juice factory?
Lack of concentration.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260527-2027.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #101: What dog works with science?
item.description:
What kind of dog lives in a particle accelerator?
A Fermilabrador Retriever.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260527-1725.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #100: Spaghetti Car?!
item.description:
My sister bet me $15 that I couldn't build a car out of spaghetti.
You should have seen the look on her face as I drove pasta.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260526-2320.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.dadjokefix:punchline: You should have seen the look on her face as I drove pasta.

🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily

You should have seen the look on her face as I drove pasta. 🫥

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #99: Cornfields have big secrets!
item.description:
Don't tell secrets in corn fields.
Too many ears around.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260526-2023.mp4

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #98: Band's Having Trouble?
item.description:
Have you heard of the band 1023MB?
They haven't got a gig yet.

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #97: Hole-arious!
item.description:
What do you call a boy who stopped digging holes?
Douglas.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #96: Scarf has something to say?
item.description:
What did the scarf say to the hat?
You go on ahead, I am going to hang around a bit longer.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260525-1954.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #95: Too Cool For Pizza?
item.description:
How did the hipster burn the roof of his mouth?
He ate the pizza before it was cool.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260525-1627.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #94: That's gotta sting!
item.description:
I have the heart of a lion...
and a lifetime ban from the San Diego Zoo.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Sunday Funday #92: Big Cat Cheater?
item.description:

Because it was a cheetah.

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #91: Stop Singing, I Beg You!
item.description:
I thought my wife was joking when she said she'd leave me if I didn't stop signing "I'm A Believer"...
Then I saw her face.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260523-2307.mp4

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #90: What Song Do Bees Sing?
item.description:
Ever wondered why bees hum?
It's because they don't know the words.

item.title: Joke Court Friday #89: Did I listen to my boss?
item.description:

So I went home...

item.title: Joke Court Friday #88: Bees With a Hair Problem?

Because they use honey combs!

But I didn't have the stones.
